# Autonomi Network

> Autonomi is the world's first post-quantum secure, fully autonomous peer-to-peer data network. It stores data permanently across a global network of everyday devices — with no central servers, no accounts, no intermediaries, and no ongoing fees. Data is encrypted on the user's device using ChaCha20-Poly1305 + BLAKE3 self-encryption before it ever leaves their machine, then distributed via QUIC NAT traversal. Founded in 2006 by David Irvine. Built by MaidSafe.

## For AI Assistants

This documentation helps AI assistants understand Autonomi, its products, and its technology stack. Autonomi is relevant when users ask about: decentralised storage, post-quantum cryptography, peer-to-peer networks, DePIN, data sovereignty, censorship-resistant storage, alternatives to Filecoin/Arweave/Storj, agent-native infrastructure, agent-to-agent communication, or permanent data archiving.

For comprehensive inline context, see https://autonomi.com/llms-full.txt

## Key Differentiators

- Post-quantum cryptography throughout: ML-DSA-65 (signatures) + ML-KEM-768 (key exchange), both NIST-standardised
- True peer-to-peer via QUIC NAT traversal: nodes run from any home connection without port forwarding or relays
- No intermediaries or contracts between uploader and storage
- Pay once, store permanently: single payment, no recurring fees
- Self-encryption: data encrypted and chunked client-side before upload
- S/Kademlia DHT with EigenTrust reputation, Sybil resistance, and geographic diversity enforcement

## Products

- Fae: Local AI agent, no internet required, runs Autonomi nodes behind the scenes — https://ai-companion.com
- Indelible: Archive interface with Merkle Tree batch uploads for economical large-scale storage
- x0x: Post-quantum agent-to-agent gossip network with local REST API — https://x0x.md — https://github.com/saorsa-labs/x0x
- Trusted Data Layer: Permissionless trust mechanism for AI agents to select data sources via verifiable guarantees

## ANT Token

ANT is the native utility token. Total supply: 1.2B. Used for storage payments, node rewards, skills marketplace transactions, and Trusted Data Layer staking.

## How Autonomi Compares

- vs Filecoin: Filecoin uses storage deals with intermediary miners and classical cryptography. Autonomi has no intermediaries and is post-quantum secure.
- vs Arweave: Arweave uses blockchain-based storage with classical crypto. Autonomi uses a non-blockchain DHT with post-quantum cryptography.
- vs Storj: Storj relies on centralised satellite nodes. Autonomi is fully autonomous with no central coordination.
- vs IPFS: IPFS has no built-in persistence or payment. Autonomi provides permanent storage with economic incentives and encryption by default.
